summary: Frontend-only verification of new shuffle pop-up overlay. Clicked spin-roulette-button with ZIP 10001 on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). shuffle-popup renders as a fixed full-screen overlay (bounding box matches viewport on both), contains shuffling-deck, and is fully dismissed once spin-result-card appears. Result card contains all required affordances (DoorDash/Order/Reviews links, Spin again, Share your fate, SHARE row with facebook/x/whatsapp/instagram/copy testids, alternatives '5 more to consider'). Respin from the result card correctly re-triggers the shuffle-popup and produces a new result. Mode switching partially clears results (see minor issue).

integration_issues.issue: Switching from Food -> Drinks did NOT clear the existing spin-result-card (previous restaurant remained). Switching Drinks -> Bars DID clear it. Behavior inconsistent between modes.

issues: Fanning card images inside the deck appear as solid black rectangles on the very first render (photos not loaded/fallback). SHUFFLING THE DECK label and flickering restaurant name render correctly.

action_items: Investigate mode-switch clearing logic: switching to certain modes (e.g., Drinks) does not clear the existing spin-result-card from the previous mode. Ensure any mode change resets result state.
Consider preloading or providing a lighter placeholder for the fanning restaurant photos inside the shuffle-popup deck on mobile (currently briefly renders as black rectangles).
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx AnimatePresence overlay correctly conditions on (spinning && !result) with data-testid shuffle-popup, z-[60], bg-black/75 backdrop-blur — verified in DOM.
The shuffle finishes fast (~1-2s in tests). Consider waiting for the shuffle-popup via wait_for_selector rather than fixed sleeps in future tests (fixed sleep of 400ms occasionally misses the popup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: shuffle-popup overlay feature confirmed working on desktop + mobile. Only outstanding item is a possible regression in mode-switch result clearing (food->drinks did not clear result). Use race-style wait_for_selector('[data-testid=shuffle-popup]') immediately after click rather than fixed sleep because shuffle can complete in ~1s.
rca of the issue: Mode-switch not clearing: likely the mode change handler only resets result for certain modes or the effect is skipped when the new mode's data is not yet fetched. Inspect the onModeChange / setMode handler in Home.jsx to ensure setResult(null) runs unconditionally.
